notes: First-contact visibility check: after one trivial turn the dashboard shows WHICH model the session runs and HOW FULL its context is. gemini-cli carries everything in the *.jsonl transcript the daemon tails: the gemini assistant message's top-level model -> ModelName (default boot model, no --model flag; the pinned variant is 5.2), the per-message tokens block -> TotalTokens, and the context window from the capacity table for the resolved gemini model -> ComputeContextUtilization > 0. The phase DSL asserts the state arc; observations assert the model/cost/token vector. context_window and cost are provisional on the LiteLLM cache carrying gemini-3-flash-preview at record time (settled by record).

text: Turn completes back to ready; SessionMetrics.ModelName is the default boot model (not 'unknown') and context utilization > 0 (window from the capacity table for the resolved gemini model)
